case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA ALBORNOZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESETNED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTJUAN RAMON RAIGOZA ALBORNOZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $638.12 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,507.04 AS TO DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALBORNOZ, JUAN RAMON RAIGOZA
